'''Tolut''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Armalat]] who was one of the seven delegates of the [[Unity Council]] on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. It appeared that Tolut was slightly [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], however he was never considered for training in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Tolut was loud-mouthed and impatient, but he knew when he was beaten.

Tolut scoffed at the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], considering them to be dishonorable and considering the power of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] a simple trick anyone could perform, as seen when he used his own mild Force-ability to levitate a glass of [[Water/Legends|water]] slightly off the table. He was soon put in his place by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]], who proceeded to lift up an entire pitcher of water using the Force and tip it over on the mouthy Armalat's head, soaking and humiliating him in front of the [[Unity Council|Council]]. He soon accepted his defeat.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{1st}}
